summary: Added novel check/firm/recent/reference commands wrapping the openFDA enforcement search with the safety contract.
reason: The generated endpoint surface exposes raw openFDA search; these commands pre-build the common recall-lookup queries and enforce the health-data safety contract — cite the recall_number, print the FDA class legend and disclaimer, and report 'no recall records found' (never 'safe') on a 404 no-match. They carry pp:no-error-path-probe because an unknown drug/firm/recall-number is indistinguishable from a valid one with no recalls.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli passes; live check/firm/recent/reference verified against openFDA; dogfood full 46/46 pass.
